generation.image_prompt: Traditional mystical illustration in the style of 1900s lithography, with clean bold black ink outlines. FULL BLEED: Image content (trees, rocks, sky) MUST touch all four physical edges of the 2:3 image. ABSOLUTELY NO WHITE MARGINS, NO VINTAGE PAPER BORDERS, NO MATTED EDGES. ABSOLUTELY NO TEXT, NO LABELS, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS IN THE ARTWORK. STRICTLY ANTHROPOMORPHIC. The subject is a Taiwan leopard cat standing upright on two legs with human-like posture and proportions. It MUST wear clothing or robes. Essential markers: white spots on back of black ears, white forehead stripes, and rosette leopard cat fur patterns. NO FOUR-LEGGED ANIMAL POSTURE. A skeletal anthropomorphic Taiwan leopard cat wearing black iron armor, riding a pale skeletal steed across a field of withered autumn grass. He holds a banner with a white rosette pattern. In the background, the shadows of broken highway fences are visible under a blood-red sky. Meaning: Transition, the end of old habits, and the stark reality of survival on the brink.
generation.narrative: A skeletal anthropomorphic Taiwan leopard cat wearing black iron armor, riding a pale skeletal steed across a field of withered autumn grass. He holds a banner with a white rosette pattern. In the background, the shadows of broken highway fences are visible under a blood-red sky. Meaning: Transition, the end of old habits, and the stark reality of survival on the brink.

meanings.upright: Endings, profound change, transition, letting go of the old to make way for the new.
meanings.reversed: Fear of change, holding on, stagnation, or refusing to accept a necessary transition.

ecology.habitat_fragment: a clearing after a forest fire or heavy clearance
ecology.risk_theme: the reality of mortality and the cycle of ecosystem renewal
ecology.mapping_note: Death represents the harsh reality of mortality in the wild—but also the deep ecological truth that death feeds the forest, making way for new life and ecosystem regeneration.
ecology.zh: 棲地樣貌：a clearing after a forest fire or heavy clearance 。 生存威脅：the reality of mortality and the cycle of ecosystem renewal 。 牌義關聯：Death represents the harsh reality of mortality in the wild—but also the deep ecological truth that death feeds the forest, making way for new life and ecosystem regeneration. 。 石虎特徵：台灣石虎 。 生命階段：the end of the cycle

website.excerpt: A profound transition, Death reminds us of the stark mortality in the wild and the inevitable cycle of renewal.
website.seo_description: The Death tarot card reimagined as the stark reality of mortality and the ecological cycle of renewal.

meaning.zh: 結束、深刻的改變、過渡期、放下過去以迎接新生。
meaning.en: Endings, profound change, transition, letting go of the old to make way for the new.
